message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml DeTrace Creature connection

title DeTrace Creature connection

participant "«Creature: Wheel»\nWheel_1" as Wheel_1
participant "«Creature: BBBBBB»\nWheel_1" as Wheel_1_BBBB
participant "«Creature: Wheel»\nWheel_2" as Wheel_2
participant "B_1" as B_1
participant "«Creature: Wheel»\nWheel_3" as Wheel_3
participant "«Creature: Wheel»\nWheel_4" as Wheel_4
participant "«Creature: Wheel»\nWheel_5" as Wheel_5
participant "«Creature: Frame»\nFrame" as Frame

activate Wheel_1
activate Wheel_1_BBBB
activate Wheel_2
activate B_1

Wheel_1 -> Wheel_2 : 1 changeOwner
activate Wheel_2
Wheel_2 -> Wheel_2 : 2 checkMatrix
Wheel_2 -> Wheel_2 : 3 checkSlot
Wheel_2 -> Wheel_2 : 4 checkOwner
deactivate Wheel_2
Wheel_2 -> Wheel_1 : 5 connectError
deactivate Wheel_1
destroy Wheel_1
Wheel_1_BBBB -> B_1 : 6 cdcdcdcddc
deactivate Wheel_1_BBBB
deactivate B_1

activate Wheel_3
activate Frame

Wheel_3 -> Frame : 1 changeOwner
activate Frame
Frame -> Frame : 2 checkMatrix
Frame -> Frame : 3 checkOwner
Frame -> Frame : 4 checkSlot
deactivate Frame
Frame -> Wheel_3 : 5 connect
deactivate Wheel_3

activate Wheel_4
Wheel_4 -> Frame : 6 changeOwner
activate Frame
Frame -> Frame : 7 checkMatrix
Frame -> Frame : 8 checkOwner
Frame -> Frame : 9 checkSlot
deactivate Frame
Frame -> Wheel_4 : 10 connect
deactivate Wheel_4

activate Wheel_5
Wheel_5 -> Frame : 11 changeOwner
activate Frame
Frame -> Frame : 12 checkMatrix
Frame -> Frame : 13 checkOwner
Frame -> Frame : 14 checkSlot
deactivate Frame
Frame -> Wheel_5 : 15 connect
deactivate Wheel_5
destroy Wheel_5

@enduml
```
